CustomField.description: Number of days from the Billing Launch Date Stamp to the Billing Activation Date Stamp field. (Billing_Activation_Date_Stamp__c - Billing_Launch_Date_Stamp__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days from the Billing Launch Date Stamp to the Billing Activation Date Stamp field.
CustomField.label: Days Billing CW to Activated Stamp
